message:
fix(runtime): prevent uint32_t multiplication overflow in adapter router and HFT gate

adapter.c: Widen `used * 100u` to uint64_t before dividing by
scaled_capacity, preventing overflow when `used` exceeds ~42 million
(0xFFFFFFFF / 100).

hft_instrument.c: Same fix for p99.9 and p99.99 percentile target
calculations — `hist->total * 999u` and `hist->total * 9999u` both
overflow uint32_t when total exceeds ~4.3M and ~430K respectively.
Cast to uint64_t before the multiply.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
